rationale: Both notes indicate strong methodological overlap: the citing paper estimates a structural demand–supply model with Bertrand pricing and tacit-collusion robustness checks, while the cited paper is a structural demand–supply framework explicitly comparing Bertrand vs collusive conduct and showing how demand specification affects conduct inference. Given this direct alignment on pricing-conduct inference (not just topical similarity), the citation is plausibly substantive and should be reviewed in second-stage judgment.
